chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1020 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15037/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Mushtaque Hussain Khaskheli, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel. -.-.-. Today, learned State Counsel has filed statement alongwith comments on behalf of official respondents/police officials in which it is stated that neither the police officials are involved in causing harassment to the petitioner nor they are patronizing the private respondents. The official respondents have also undertaken to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law if approached with such a request. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in view of above observation and with direction to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioners with further directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and to provide protection to the petitioners if they are approached with such a request by the petitioner. If the respondents have some dispute with petitioner, the same shall be settled in accordance with law and not by taking law in their hands. JUDGE
